title: Auto Terminology column

posts.cookedHtml: Is this something you’re hoping they add to Dev? If so, have you put it on the feature suggestion board? Feature requests - monday Community Forum

posts.cookedHtml: Yes, It is a features request as well as development. It is a very basic feature to have it. thanks,
